title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
